item.title: A true crime case reaches a verdict
item.description: Brooke Makenna explores a true crime case and the jury’s verdict in a story centered on jealousy and self-defense claims.

item.title: A photo helped reunite a family after 17 years
item.description: Brooke Makenna shares a story about a family search that lasted 17 years and the photo that helped bring them together again.

item.title: Held Captive for 15 Years—Shocking Case
